title: Date arrives automation for formula-generated dates
excerpt:

posts.author: Or-Mor-Yosef (Or Mor-Yosef)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
We are a non profit that uses Monday automations for reminders (among other uses). We would love to see a feature that allows creating a “date arrives” automation for formula-generated dates. At the moment, only date columns are supported. If anyone knows how to work around this, I would love to hear.
Thanks,
Or

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Or-Mor-Yosef - the best way to get around this at the moment would be to use an app like General Caster to calculate the formula and cast it to a Date column. You can then use it in automations.

Thanks
Mark
